rationale: Educ. Code §39.304 governs teacher report cards and student assessment data provided to teachers. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Each school district shall provide to each teacher the information made available under Section 39.02301(l) for the current and previous school year for all students taught by the teacher who were assessed on an assessment instrument under Section 39.023.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns teacher report cards and student assessment data, not property tax homestead exemptions.
